summary: David, what a week! You're now at 252.9 pounds, which means you've shed an impressive 62.1 pounds total since starting this journey—that's real, lasting progress. Over the past two weeks you've lost a steady 2 pounds, putting you right on pace at about 1 pound per week, which is exactly the sustainable rate that sets you up for long-term success. I noticed you logged 11 of 7 days, so you're staying engaged with your data, and that consistency is what's driving these results. Next week, let's focus on keeping that logging streak going every single day—your Dexcom and Garmin are giving you valuable insights, so capturing them all will help us fine-tune what's working. You're doing the work, and it's paying off.
